overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game depicting a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character ascends stairs through a covered plaza, passes large digital billboards, walks along streets with light traffic, and crosses an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with outdoor seating leading to stairway

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs from courtyard
moving from open courtyard into covered stairwell structure

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from a lower courtyard area toward an overpass

entered.detail: large patio umbrella over outdoor dining tables
wide concrete staircase leading upward to overpass
massive structural column with green lighting
tall vertical neon advertisement on distant building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit courtyard with outdoor seating. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by large building columns with green accent lighting, transitioning from the open courtyard into a covered stairwell structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with large digital displays

events.description: emerging from dark stairwell into brighter covered plaza with large illuminated billboard

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway passing trash bins and industrial elements toward large digital screen

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair walking past the camera toward the street exit

entered.detail: concrete overpass with metal beams overhead
large illuminated screen displaying colorful food advertisement
industrial waste containers with green lighting
concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered walkway with industrial trash bins lining the left side. A massive digital billboard displaying a food advertisement dominates the view ahead, while the concrete overpass structure creates a semi-enclosed environment with mixed artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open street level

events.description: exiting covered walkway onto open city street with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: emerging from covered walkway onto sidewalk next to street with moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street
tall skyscraper covered in vertical neon advertisements
commercial building entrances with illuminated signs

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway onto an open city street. Metal railings line the right side of the sidewalk separating pedestrian and vehicle traffic, while a tall neon-lit skyscraper becomes visible in the distance. The environment transitions from sheltered to exposed with mixed lighting from street lamps and building signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon signage and street furniture

events.description: cars passing by on the adjacent street including a white sedan

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk passing other pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large green holographic display projecting from building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open urban sidewalk with the neon tower now prominent on the right. A large green holographic advertisement projects from a building on the left. The street has light traffic with occasional vehicles passing by, and the character approaches a crosswalk with yellow safety stripes.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street
vehicle approaches and passes while character is crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk with yellow stripes while vehicles pass nearby

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with WALK signal visible
wide intersection with multiple lanes and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes and begins crossing the street. The neon tower recedes into the background on the right as vehicles pass through the intersection. The environment is fully open with clear night sky and extensive neon illumination from surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, dimly lit courtyard into the expansive, neon-saturated openness of a futuristic city intersection. It begins as the character ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by green-lit columns, moving from the open courtyard into a semi-enclosed stairwell. As the character progresses through a covered walkway lined with industrial bins, the view is dominated by a massive digital food advertisement before the path opens onto an exposed city street. The scene then expands along a sidewalk where a towering neon skyscraper and a large green holographic projection emerge against the night sky. Finally, the camera follows the character as they step onto a wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes, moving fully into the intersection amidst passing traffic and the glow of surrounding skyscrapers.
